title: Ranchi University Time Table 2025 @ ranchiuniversity.ac.in

detail.title: Ranchi University Time Table 2025 @ ranchiuniversity.ac.in
detail.short_info: The officials of Ranchi University have released the Ranchi University Time Table 2025 for MBBS, MS and MD Programmes. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

content.text: Ranchi University Time Table 2025 is Out! The Ranchi University has released the MBBS, MS and MD. For further updates on Ranchi University, candidates can follow this page.
Available Here - Ranchi University Time Table 2025

sections.heading: Important Details Ranchi University Time Table 2025
How to Download the Ranchi University Time Table 2025?

content.text: Ranchi University Time Table 2025, visit the official university website, navigate to the "Examination Programme" section, and select your course to access and save the schedule as a PDF.​

items: Go to the official Ranchi University website: https://www.ranchiuniversity.ac.in.​
On the homepage, find and click the “Examination Programme/Centre” tab or go directly to https://www.ranchiuniversity.ac.in/exam_programme.​
Browse the displayed examination schedules for your specific course (e.g., BA, BSc, BCom, MA, MSc, MCom, MBBS, etc.) and semester.​
Click the PDF link for your course to view the detailed date sheet.​
Download or print the file for exam preparation and reference.

rows: Revised Examination Programme for 3rd Professional Part-II (MBBS) Supplementary Examination 2025
Examination Programme and Centre for M.D., M.S. Annual Examination 2025
